evals.prompt: We have marketing and sales as separate teams now. Marketing says they're sending good leads, sales says the leads are garbage. How do we fix this?
evals.expected_output: Should identify the classic MQL definition misalignment problem. Should recommend building a shared lead lifecycle with agreed stage definitions. Should design a lead scoring model. Should recommend a weekly MQL quality review feedback loop. Should suggest adding engagement context to the handoff. Should provide an SLA framework for response times.
